panels.description: OTel-native rewrite using Prometheus-sanitized Kubernetes metrics from kubeletstats/k8sattributes. Workload grouping is inferred from enriched resource labels such as k8s_deployment_name, k8s_statefulset_name, k8s_daemonset_name, k8s_job_name, and k8s_cronjob_name. The original kube_pod_info and namespace_workload_pod:kube_pod_owner:relabel joins were removed. host_network filtering is omitted because it is not implied by the provided OTel config.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (workload, workload_type) (label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_deployment_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_deployment_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "deployment", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_statefulset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_statefulset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "statefulset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_daemonset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_daemonset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "daemonset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_job_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_job_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "job", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_cronjob_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_cronjob_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "cronjob", "__name__", ".*")))

panels.title: Average Container Bandwidth by Workload: Received

panels.description: OTel-native rewrite using Prometheus-sanitized Kubernetes metrics from kubeletstats/k8sattributes. Workload grouping is inferred from enriched resource labels such as k8s_deployment_name, k8s_statefulset_name, k8s_daemonset_name, k8s_job_name, and k8s_cronjob_name. The original kube_pod_info and namespace_workload_pod:kube_pod_owner:relabel joins were removed. host_network filtering is omitted because it is not implied by the provided OTel config.

targets.expr: sort_desc(avg by (workload, workload_type) (label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_deployment_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_deployment_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "deployment", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_statefulset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_statefulset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "statefulset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_daemonset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_daemonset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "daemonset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_job_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_job_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "job", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace((8 * rate(k8s_pod_network_io_bytes_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_cronjob_name!=""}[$__rate_interval])), "workload", "$1", "k8s_cronjob_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "cronjob", "__name__", ".*")))

panels.title: Average Container Bandwidth by Workload: Transmitted

panels.description: OTel-native rewrite. Uses k8s_pod_network_errors_total as the closest native equivalent because a dedicated dropped-packet metric is not implied by the provided OTel config. Workload grouping is inferred from OTel-enriched labels.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (workload, workload_type) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_deployment_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_deployment_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "deployment", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_statefulset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_statefulset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "statefulset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_daemonset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_daemonset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "daemonset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_job_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_job_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "job", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="receive",k8s_cronjob_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_cronjob_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "cronjob", "__name__", ".*")))

panels.title: Rate of Received Packets Dropped

panels.description: OTel-native rewrite. Uses k8s_pod_network_errors_total as the closest native equivalent because a dedicated dropped-packet metric is not implied by the provided OTel config. Workload grouping is inferred from OTel-enriched labels.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (workload, workload_type) (label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_deployment_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_deployment_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "deployment", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_statefulset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_statefulset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "statefulset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_daemonset_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_daemonset_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "daemonset", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_job_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_job_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "job", "__name__", ".*") or label_replace(label_replace(rate(k8s_pod_network_errors_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster",k8s_namespace_name="$namespace",direction="transmit",k8s_cronjob_name!=""}[$__rate_interval]), "workload", "$1", "k8s_cronjob_name", "(.*)"), "workload_type", "cronjob", "__name__", ".*")))

panels.title: Rate of Transmitted Packets Dropped
